endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/reports/{aggregation}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AGGREGATION}} with a real aggregation. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
